1.name: Novice
1.description: Just starting out on your heroic journey. You have potential but lack experience.

2.name: Developing
2.description: Developing your abilities and gaining confidence in your powers.

3.name: Competent
3.description: A competent hero who can handle most everyday threats reliably.

4.name: Professional
4.description: A professional hero with established capabilities and reputation.

5.name: Veteran
5.description: A veteran hero with significant experience and refined abilities.

6.name: Expert
6.description: An expert hero whose skills are recognized and respected.

7.name: Elite
7.description: An elite hero operating at the highest levels of competence.

8.name: Master
8.description: A master hero pushing the boundaries of human capability.

9.name: Legendary
9.description: A legendary hero whose deeds inspire others and shape history.

10.name: World-class Expert
10.description: A world-class expert representing the absolute pinnacle of heroic achievement.
